source.scope: Official-source-backed Netherlands calendar-year 2026 resident Box 1 tax with general and employment tax credits for supported full-year AOW age schedules.

NL.notes: Calendar-year 2026 resident Box 1 tax with general and employment tax credits from caller-confirmed Box 1 taxable income, aggregate income and employment income. The AOW transition year and other credits remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 resident Box 1 tax and standard general and employment credits for supported full-year AOW age schedules.
